name: Sugar Free Whipped Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the instant dry milk and cold water in a large bowl. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow the milk to absorb the liquid.
2. Beat the mixture at high speed with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form, about 4 minutes.
3. Gradually add the lemon juice while continuing to beat on high speed until incorporated.
4. Mix together the sugar substitute and equivalent sugar substitute in a separate bowl. Add this mixture gradually to the whipped milk while beating on high speed for another 4 minutes.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract and refrigerate the topping until ready to use. For best results, prepare just before serving as the volume will decrease over time.
6. This topping can be spread on pies or used as a garnish for desserts such as puddings or gelatins. One serving contains approximately 12 calories.
